title: salix × pormensis
intro: Salix × purpurea 'Pormensis' is a cultivar of the purple osier willow (Salix purpurea), a deciduous shrub or small tree known for its stunning purple foliage. The medicinal properties of Salix × purpurea 'Pormensis' include its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated tissues. This plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Salix × purpurea 'Pormensis' can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
